name: Cars.com Inc.
business: Cars.com Inc. is a trusted audience-powered and data-driven technology platform that simplifies buying and selling cars. The flagship Cars.com marketplace connects millions of consumers to dealerships across the U.S. The company also provides digital solutions including dealer websites, trade and appraisal tools, and media solutions.

exposures.sentence: Carson™, which launched in 2025, provides consumers with an AI-powered natural language search experience.

In November 2021, we acquired the stock of CreditIQ, Inc., a privately held, automotive financial technology platform that provides instant online loan screening and approvals to facilitate online car buying.
